description_long: This doll features a large, round head with oversized, pixelated eyes and a small, simple mouth, reminiscent of the character Buttercup from The Powerpuff Girls. The head is predominantly black with a pale face and sharply defined, angular eyebrows, giving it a determined expression. The doll has two pointed, black pigtails extending from either side of the head, and its body is small and cylindrical, dressed in a black dress with a pale green horizontal stripe. The arms are short and rounded, with one arm colored pale and the other black, matching the legs, which are also asymmetrical in color. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, suggesting a plastic or vinyl material. The overall design is stylized and cartoonish, with a focus on bold shapes and high contrast colors.
description: A stylized doll with a large black head, pixelated eyes, and a black-and-green dress, inspired by Buttercup from The Powerpuff Girls. The doll has pointed pigtails, asymmetrical arms and legs, and a smooth, glossy surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's large pixelated eyes, angular eyebrows, and the full design of the face and dress.
description_view_1: Angled top-side view highlighting the smooth, rounded head and the pointed pigtail on the left side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, both pointed pigtails, and the back of the dress with the pale green stripe.
description_view_3: Angled top-side view from the opposite side, showing the right pigtail and the side of the face and dress.
attribute_clothing_style: Cartoon-inspired sleeveless black dress with a pale green horizontal stripe, matching the Buttercup character from The Powerpuff Girls, with no additional patterns or embellishments.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms slightly bent and angled outward, and legs straight and close together.
attribute_facial_expression: Determined expression with a small, neutral mouth, large wide-open eyes, and sharply angled eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Short, straight black hair styled into two pointed pigtails on either side of the head.
